name: RABBIT-FILE-BUG-6
title: Work Protocol auto-closes only the linked-item bug; secondary bugs fixed by the same commit remain open
description:
When a TDD cycle's fix commit resolves multiple bugs (e.g., a single PR addresses BUG-A and BUG-B together because they share a root cause or one is discovered while fixing the other), only the primary linked bug — the one passed as --linked-item to dispatch-tdd-subagent.py — gets auto-closed by rabbit-file Work Protocol Step 5. Other bugs fixed by the same commit remain open and must be closed manually by the human or by a follow-up rabbit-file work session.

Observed: PR #102 closed both RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-8 (primary, linked-item) and RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-9 (fixed in the same commit because moving _strip_quotes was part of the BUG-8 fix scope). BUG-8 was auto-closed by item-status.py on TDD completion; BUG-9 had to be closed manually in a subsequent step. From the human's perspective this is friction — the system already knows both bugs are fixed (the commit message references both, the impl-suggestion lists both, the human approved both being addressed together) but cannot auto-close the secondary bug.

Fix candidates:
1. dispatch-tdd-subagent.py accepts a --linked-items flag (plural) taking a comma-separated list of item dirs and item types; the TDD subagent closes all of them with the same impl_commit on success. The current --linked-item / --item-type pair becomes the single-item shorthand.
2. rabbit-file Work Protocol Step 5 post-merge step scans the merged commit message for additional bug IDs matching the pattern <FEATURE>-BUG-<N> and prompts the human to also close them with the same impl_commit.
3. impl-suggestion JSON gains an optional resolves array of item dirs; dispatch-tdd-subagent.py reads it and closes all of them on test-green, generalising the linked-item mechanism into a multi-item resolution.

Approach 3 is closest to the spirit of the current design (impl-suggestion is already the source of truth for what the cycle addresses) and avoids hardcoding the assumption that linked-item is singular.

history.note: Misrouted — fix lives in tdd-subagent (dispatch-tdd-subagent.py). Re-filed as TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-1.
